payload.name: Fitiger ASD and SPED Mealtime Choking Readiness Resource
payload.description: Free educational resource for caregivers, schools, and disability-support teams on mealtime choking-risk planning for autistic students and special education settings. It focuses on observation, readiness steps, supervision planning, communication, and when to call emergency services. It does not replace CPR, first aid training, emergency medical services, or professional medical advice.
payload.phone: Fitiger Life LLC, 1037 S Claremont St, San Mateo, CA 94402, USA; info@fitiger.net; +1 (458)-250-0756
